title: Music Disk DJ
description: This mod enables in-game music search from YouTube and Soundcloud, letting you replace default music discs with your preferred songs. Share playlists via books. Fully client-side design.
body:
![](https://github.com/Plugway/MusicDiskDj/raw/main/media/logo.png "Poggers")
# Music Disk DJ

---
This mod allows you to seamlessly search music from YouTube and Soundcloud within the game and provides the functionality to replace vanilla music discs with your favorite songs. Also share your playlists with other players via books (beta 0.8.0, YT only for now). The mod is designed to be fully client-side.

## Download

---
You can access a pre-compiled version of this mod on the GitHub [releases page](https://github.com/Plugway/MusicDiskDj/releases) or find it here on Modrinth.

## Additional Info

---
- Sorry to interrupt you, but I've just found out that the mod works reasonably well on Quilt, although I haven't tested it extensively.

- This marks my inaugural venture into mod creation, and I extend my preemptive apologies should any unexpected issues arise. A version "1.0.0" signifies not flawless perfection, but rather that the mod is in a state where it should not prompt immediate deletion by its users.

- This mod requires [fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to work.

- The Mod includes a yt-dlp executable. That means the mod won't work anywhere except Windows for now. Also, if you have concerns about this file, you have the option to substitute it with your own version (this entails downloading [yt-dlp](https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp) independently and replacing it within the jar file).

- When you initially create a resource pack, it won't activate automatically. You'll need to enable it manually, but this is a one-time occurrence. In the future, it will work as intended.

- Press 'J' to open the GUI or change key binding in settings.

Feel free to report any [issues](https://github.com/Plugway/MusicDiskDj/issues) if things aren't working as expected.
